11476.full_instructions: Head to the light and make a left. pass a parking lot on the left and a park on the right before going through the light. Stop in front of the bank just before the bend in the road on the left.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD to the light and TURN_LEFT
MOVE_FORWARD past the parking lot on the left and the park on the right
MOVE_FORWARD through the light
Stop in front of the bank just before the bend in the road on the left

4077.full_instructions: Head straight to the first light and make a right. You will then go through the next three lights and at the fourth light you will want to make a left. You will pass through a very quick light and just past the light you will want to stop.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD to the first light
TURN_RIGHT at the first light
MOVE_FORWARD PAST the next three lights
TURN_LEFT at the fourth light
MOVE_FORWARD PAST the very quick light
Stop just past the very quick light

1624.full_instructions: Go forward to the intersection and turn left. Go forward until reaching the light. Take a right here and go through another light. At the following light, Greenwich Lane and St Vincent's Triangle Park are on the corners. Take a left following the street to the left of the park and stop before the next light in front of Equinox.

sub_instructions.description: Go forward to the intersection and turn left
Go forward until reaching the traffic light
Turn right at the traffic light
Go forward through the next traffic light
Turn left at the following traffic light where Greenwich Lane and St Vincent's Triangle Park are on the corners
Stop before the next traffic light in front of Equinox

4130.full_instructions: Go past the light right in front of you. Go past the next intersection with Sushiden on your right. At the following light with Roast Chicken on your far left corner, and subway entrances, turn right. At the next light with TGI Fridays on your far right corner, stop in the middle of the intersection.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD past the traffic light ahead
MOVE_FORWARD past the next intersection with Sushiden on the right
TURN_RIGHT at the traffic light with Roast Chicken on the far left corner and subway entrances
MOVE_FORWARD to the next traffic light with TGI Fridays on the far right corner and stop in the middle of the intersection

4117.full_instructions: Go to the lights and turn right. At the next set of lights, with Duane Reade on the corner, turn right. Go through the next 2 sets of lights. Au Bon Pain will be on left corner. Go to almost the end of the street and stop at Citibank on the left.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the traffic lights and turn right.
Turn right at the next set of lights where Duane Reade is on the corner.
Go straight through the next 2 sets of traffic lights.
Continue past Au Bon Pain located on the left corner.
Proceed to almost the end of the street and stop at Citibank on the left.

11574.full_instructions: Turn left at the end of the block. Go straight to pass TD Bank on the left, then turn right in two more lights. Take a couple of steps and stop.

sub_instructions.description: Turn left at the end of the block
Go straight to pass TD Bank on the left
Turn right in two more lights
Take a couple of steps and stop

5647.full_instructions: Walk to the light and turn right. Walk past the light with a left turn. Go through the next light. Walk down to the next intersection. Turn left - you might see NYU Dentistry on the left corner. Stop several steps past the left turn.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD to the light and TURN_RIGHT
MOVE_FORWARD past the light with a left turn
MOVE_FORWARD through the next light
MOVE_FORWARD to the next intersection
TURN_LEFT at the intersection near NYU Dentistry
MOVE_FORWARD several steps past the turn and stop

7331.full_instructions: Head to first immediate light and make a right. Head down the long block and stop at the corner with Duane Reade on the far left. Turn left here. Head past the next light, having passed a bike rental on the left. Stop in front of the Jensen lewis building on right.

sub_instructions.description: Head to first immediate light and make a right.
Head down the long block to the corner with Duane Reade on the far left.
Turn left at the corner.
Head past the next light, passing a bike rental on the left.
Stop in front of the Jensen lewis building on the right.

4755.full_instructions: Turn left at the 1st light and go straight through the light immediately after. Pass straight through both of the next set of double lights. You may see water on your left. At the next set of lights, go straight through the 1st and turn right at the 2nd. Go straight through the next light and stop at the car wash on left.

sub_instructions.description: Turn left at the 1st light
Go straight through the light immediately after
Pass straight through both of the next set of double lights
Go straight through the 1st light of the next set
Turn right at the 2nd light of the next set
Go straight through the next light
Stop at the car wash on the left

11197.full_instructions: Pass the Waverly Inn on the right and then the right side street and then turn right at the T-intersection with Starbucks on the left. At the lights with Roasting Plant on the right turn left. Pass a park on your left and go through the lights. Pass Duane Reade on the right and stop just before Subway on the right corner.

sub_instructions.description: Pass the Waverly Inn on the right and then the right side street
Turn right at the T-intersection with Starbucks on the left
Turn left at the lights with Roasting Plant on the right
Pass a park on the left
Go through the lights
Pass Duane Reade on the right
Stop just before Subway on the right corner

11247.full_instructions: Go through the first set of lights. Pass Subway on the left as you head to the next lights where you will turn right. At the next corner with Bank of America on the right turn left. Pass Zara on the right corner and stop between that and Don Peterson. It is before the bus stop.

sub_instructions.description: Go through the first set of lights
Pass Subway on the left
Turn right at the next lights
Turn left at the next corner with Bank of America on the right
Pass Zara on the right corner
Stop between Zara and Don Peterson, before the bus stop

11844.full_instructions: Go straight for a few blocks until you reach BP gas station on the left. Turn left after passing it. Stop just after Quality Inn on the right, which is shortly after a church.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight for a few blocks until you reach BP gas station on the left
Turn left after passing the BP gas station
Stop just after Quality Inn on the right, passing the church first

2627.full_instructions: Go to the lights and turn right. Go to the second set of lights and turn left. You will want to stop at the corner of the first building you arrive at. Santander will be on the left and Herald Square is on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the lights and turn right
Go to the second set of lights and turn left
Stop at the corner of the first building you arrive at

6448.full_instructions: Walk forward and before reaching the light, you will turn left on a street or sidewalk adjacent to the street. Go through 1 light and then another light with a Starbucks on the corner. Walk through yet another light and step before the next light. The Counter and a bike rental will be on either side of you.

sub_instructions.description: Walk forward and turn left before reaching the traffic light.
Move forward through the first traffic light.
Move forward through the second traffic light, noting the Starbucks on the corner.
Move forward through the third traffic light.
Stop before the next traffic light, with The Counter and a bike rental on either side.

6165.full_instructions: Make two left turns to head the opposite way on the other side of the block. Keep going to pass a playground on your left, then turn right. Pass a bus stop on your right and stop in front of Chase on the right.

sub_instructions.description: TURN_LEFT
TURN_LEFT
MOVE_FORWARD past the playground on the left
TURN_RIGHT
MOVE_FORWARD past the bus stop on the right
Stop at Chase on the right

11790.full_instructions: Walk past the park on the right to the end of the road and turn left. Go past a high school to the end of the block with Chase on the corner. Turn right and pass CVS and Duane Reade before a light which you will go through. Stop 1/2 to the next light near Gabay's and Subway on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Walk past the park on the right to the end of the road
Turn left
Go past a high school to the end of the block with Chase on the corner
Turn right
Pass CVS and Duane Reade
Go through the traffic light
Stop 1/2 to the next light near Gabay's and Subway on the right

1993.full_instructions: Go to the lights and turn right. Continue through the next 2 sets of lights. You will want to stop before the next set of lights. It will be about the middle of the last building on your right. You may be able to see Big Daddy's Gramercy Park across the street.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the lights and turn right.
Continue through the next 2 sets of lights.
Stop before the next set of lights, near the middle of the last building on the right.

2478.full_instructions: Head straight through the first light and at the second light make a left. Go to the next light and make a right. Pass by the Marmara on the left and stop right before the bike rental on your right.

sub_instructions.description: Head straight through the first light
Turn left at the second light
Go to the next light and make a right
Pass by the Marmara on the left
Stop right before the bike rental on your right

10697.full_instructions: Go to the end of the road with a park in front and turn right. When you reach the corner of the park, turn left. Go the width of the park and through the light. At the light with Starbucks and Flatiron Hotel on the right corners, turn left. Stop a few steps after turning, near Rizzoli and Num Pang on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the end of the road with the park in front and turn right.
Turn left at the corner of the park.
Go past the width of the park and proceed through the traffic light.
Turn left at the traffic light where Starbucks and Flatiron Hotel are on the right corners.
Stop a few steps after turning, near Rizzoli and Num Pang on the right.

4224.full_instructions: Go straight and take a right at Capital One. Go through the next 3 intersections and at the 3rd one take a right. Stop at Delis 48.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD
TURN_RIGHT at Capital One
MOVE_FORWARD past 2 intersections
TURN_RIGHT at the 3rd intersection
Stop at Delis 48

6415.full_instructions: Head to the light and turn left. Go past the next 3 lights with Skyline Hotel on the left corner. Stop at the 4th light with As is NYC on the right corner.

sub_instructions.description: Head to the light and turn left.
Go past the next 3 lights with Skyline Hotel on the left corner.
Stop at the 4th light with As is NYC on the right corner.

2329.full_instructions: Go forward past Columbus Park and turn left at the T-intersection. Go to the first set of lights in the double intersection and turn left. 10 Below Ice Cream is on the left corner. Stop here.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD PAST Columbus Park
TURN_LEFT AT T-intersection
MOVE_FORWARD TO first set of lights in the double intersection
TURN_LEFT AT first set of lights
Stop at 10 Below Ice Cream

11868.full_instructions: Head up the block, passing Domino's on the corner before proceeding through the light. Go through another light and Pizza 33 will be on the corner. At the following light make a right and pass 99$ pizza on the left. Go just past the next light and then stop in front of the wax center.

sub_instructions.description: Head up the block passing Domino's on the corner and proceed through the traffic light
Go through the next traffic light passing Pizza 33 on the corner
Turn right at the following traffic light
Move forward passing 99$ pizza on the left
Go past the next traffic light and stop in front of the wax center

6220.full_instructions: Turn right at the light immediately in front of you. Go to the next light with Chipotle on the near left corner and turn left. Go past the next 2 lights with bike rentals on the right. At the 3rd light with Cafe au bon gout, stop in the intersection.

sub_instructions.description: Turn right at the light immediately in front of you
Turn left at the next light with Chipotle on the near left corner
Go past the next 2 lights with bike rentals on the right
Stop in the intersection at the 3rd light with Cafe au bon gout

6199.full_instructions: Go straight until merging onto the main road and follow that road where you should be passing Buy Rite Pharmacy and a mailbox on the right. Pass 1 light and at the following, you should take a sharp right turn. Go forward and stop a step before a left side street where a church is on the far left corner.

MOVE_FORWARD along the road passing Buy Rite Pharmacy and a mailbox on the right
MOVE_FORWARD past 1 light
TURN_RIGHT at the following light
MOVE_FORWARD and stop before the left side street with a church on the far left corner

5261.full_instructions: Turn left at the first light, with Citibank on your near right corner. Go straight through two lights, passing Starbucks on the right between them. Stop at the second building on the right, just after Roast Chicken. It's probably only a few steps after the light.

sub_instructions.description: TURN_LEFT at the first light, noting Citibank on the near right corner
MOVE_FORWARD straight through two lights, passing Starbucks on the right
MOVE_FORWARD to stop at the second building on the right, just after Roast Chicken

7364.full_instructions: Go to the third set of lights with Bank of America on the corner and turn left. Pass Boiler Bar on the right and Manhattan School for Career Development on the left. You will stop when you reach the last building on the left, it will be just after La Sultana on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the third set of lights with Bank of America on the corner and turn left
Pass Boiler Bar on the right and Manhattan School for Career Development on the left

10347.full_instructions: Head to the light with TD Bank on the left corner, then turn left. At the next light with Citibank on the left corner, turn right. Head to the following light with Hong Kong Supermarket on the far right corner. Cross the street, then stop there.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD to the traffic light with TD Bank on the left corner, then TURN_LEFT
MOVE_FORWARD to the next traffic light with Citibank on the left corner, then TURN_RIGHT
MOVE_FORWARD to the following traffic light with Hong Kong Supermarket on the far right corner
MOVE_FORWARD to cross the street and stop

4291.full_instructions: Go to the lights and turn right. Go through the next 2 sets of lights. At the 3rd set, with Eisenberg Sandwich on the corner, turn right. Take a few steps and stop just after Sagaponack on the left.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the lights and turn right
Go through the next 2 sets of lights
Turn right at the 3rd set of lights, with Eisenberg Sandwich on the corner
Take a few steps and stop just after Sagaponack on the left

12751.full_instructions: Take a sharp left. if you end up on a road going the direction you came from, go back and choose the one just to the right. Go through the light and under a number of overpasses before reaching another light. Turn right. Take two more rights and stop a few steps after the second. Cupcake Cafe is before the last right.

MOVE_FORWARD through the light.
MOVE_FORWARD under the overpasses.
TURN_RIGHT at the light.
TURN_RIGHT.
MOVE_FORWARD past the Cupcake Cafe.
TURN_RIGHT.
MOVE_FORWARD a few steps and stop.

10426.full_instructions: Turn left after you pass a bus stop on your left. Pass a playground on your left and a tiny garden on your right, then cross the street. Stop after exiting the intersection. There will be a 7-Eleven on your right.

sub_instructions.description: Pass the bus stop on your left
Turn left

Cross the street

11070.full_instructions: Walk to the 1st light and make a left turn. Go past the next 2 lights with Calvary Church on the far right corner. Stop one step before the next light. Morton Williams Supermarket should be on your left.

Go past the next 2 lights with Calvary Church on the far right corner.
Stop one step before the next light.

1994.full_instructions: Go to the third set of lights and turn right. Big Daddy's will be on the left hand side at the corner. The last 2 sets of lights are very close together so look for Big Daddy's. Go to the next set of lights and stop at the lights. You should see Fraiche Maxx across the intersection.

Look for Big Daddy's on the left hand side at the corner to confirm the turn
Go to the next set of lights and stop at the lights

3450.full_instructions: Go straight through the next three intersections and at the fourth one where Le Coucou is take a right. Continue on and take a left at the next intersection where Starbucks is then stop at HSBC.

TURN_RIGHT at Le Coucou
MOVE_FORWARD
TURN_LEFT at Starbucks
Stop at HSBC

11604.full_instructions: Head straight to the light with Subway at the left corner, then make a right turn. Go through the next 2 lights with Jensen-Lewis on the far right corner. Go exactly 1/2 block and stop right in between the 1st and 2nd building on your left.

sub_instructions.description: Head straight to the light with Subway at the left corner
Make a right turn

3782.full_instructions: Go straight to the intersection and turn left. Go straight through three lights and at the fourth light stop in the intersection after passing Starbucks on your right.

Turn left

3578.full_instructions: Head to the first light and make a right. Pass through two more lights and you will see a small triangular park on your right. Just past that at the next light make a right. And stop in the middle of the park.
